name: create_macro
full_help:
create_macro

Description: 
Create a Macro

Syntax: 
create_macro  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Macro to create.

Categories: 
XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
